text:
EXPLANATION: The Open LLM Leaderboard is an active project hosted by Hugging Face, and the cited individuals are recognized as the primary researchers and maintainers associated with the development of the leaderboard and its v2 update. As this is a software project/platform rather than a traditional academic paper, the citation of the project team members is appropriate and accurate.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/spaces/open-llm-leaderboard/open_llm_leaderboard
FOUND_TITLE: Open LLM Leaderboard
FOUND_AUTHORS: Clémentine Fourrier, Nathan Habib, Alina Lozovskaya, Konrad Szafer, Thomas Wolf
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
